cited_facts.why_it_matters: States the amendment was disabled due to a bug and will be replaced, indicating it is no longer a viable candidate for activation.
Explicitly labels the amendment status as 'obsolete/removed: OBSOLETE', which triggers the REJECT rule for retired/obsolete proposals.

output_json.decision_summary: The packet explicitly identifies the 'Batch' amendment as obsolete and removed (F5) and notes it was disabled due to a bug with a replacement planned (F1). According to the task rules, REJECT is the required route for retired or obsolete proposals. This takes precedence over other considerations.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: The amendment is safe to enable.

override_questions: Is there any evidence that the obsolete status is incorrect or that the amendment has been revived?
validator_work_item.recommended_validator_action: Reject the amendment as it is obsolete and disabled.
review_questions: Does the packet confirm the amendment is obsolete?
validator_work_item.title: Reject Obsolete Batch Amendment
